title: Onboarding - Eula page - check page UI
scenario: EULA page header, description, and instructions text display correctly on first app launch in Poly Studio Mobile onboarding flow
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Observe the Onboarding screen that appears.
3. Locate the EULA (End User License Agreement) page within the onboarding flow.
4. Verify the header text is displayed correctly on the EULA page.
5. Verify the description text is displayed correctly on the EULA page.
6. Verify the instructions text is displayed correctly on the EULA page.
expected: The EULA page displays the correct header, description, and instructions text as per the design specifications.
